description: Bank Holding Company consolidated — the primary FR Y-9C series
typical_use: FR Y-9C schedules (HC, HI, HC-B, HC-R, etc.)
notes: CORRECTED v6.0: BHCK is CONSOLIDATED (domestic+foreign), NOT domestic-only. Verified via Fed MDRM items 2170 and 3792 (BHCK2170/BHCK3792 both consolidated) + Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ. Domestic-only deposit breakouts use BHDM; foreign use BHFN.

description: Bank Holding Company deposits/items in domestic offices
notes: Domestic-office scope. E.g. BHDM6631 (noninterest-bearing) / BHDM6636 (interest-bearing) deposits in domestic offices. Verified via FR Y-9C user guide + Fed MDRM. Added v6.0.

description: Bank Holding Company deposits/items in foreign offices/Edge & Agreement subs/IBFs
notes: Foreign-office scope. E.g. BHFN6631 noninterest-bearing deposits in foreign offices. Verified via FR Y-9C user guide + Fed MDRM. Added v6.0.
Parent-company-only series reported on FR Y-9LP, NOT FR Y-9C. Verified via Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ ('BHCP is for Y9LP data') and Fed MDRM items 2170/2200. Added v6.0.

description: Small bank holding company parent-only financials
notes: Parent-only series for small HCs on FR Y-9SP. Verified via Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ ('BHSP for Y9SP data'). Added v6.0.

description: Bank Holding Company Schedule HC-R risk-based (standardized) capital items
notes: Consolidated. Verified via Fed MDRM item 3792 (BHCA3792 = total qualifying capital allowable under risk-based capital guidelines, FR Y-9C). Refined from prior 'risk-weighted assets' label.

description: Bank Holding Company Schedule HC-R advanced-approaches capital items
notes: Consolidated. Verified via Fed MDRM item 3792 (BHCW3792 = total risk-based capital, consolidated, 3/31/2014-present). This — not BHCAP — is the confirmed advanced-approaches series. Added v6.0.

scope: BHC consolidated — small item set (incl. HC-D trading detail)
description: Bank Holding Company — small FR Y-9C series incl. Schedule HC-D trading-asset detail
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic BHCM = 9 items, FR Y-9C; e.g. BHCM3531 = trading U.S. Treasury securities). Prior 'domestic post-2018' label not supported by the data.

scope: BHC consolidated — total/aggregate items (+ some FR Y-11)
description: Bank Holding Company consolidated total/aggregate items
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic BHCT = 46 items; FR Y-9C + FR Y-11). A limited 'total' series — BHCK remains the primary consolidated prefix.

description: Does not exist in MDRM — earlier releases used BHCFA-prefixed items 223/224/225 for Tier1/Tier2/Total capital
notes: CORRECTED v6.0: the real codes are BHCA8274 (Tier 1), BHCA5311 (Tier 2), BHCA3792 (Total). Mnemonics 'BHCF'/'BHCFA' have 0 MDRM items. Row kept as an errata pointer.

scope: Not a standalone mnemonic (= BHCA + item P###)
description: 8-char codes like BHCAP859 decompose as mnemonic BHCA + item P859
notes: CLARIFIED v6.0: mnemonic 'BHCAP' = 0 MDRM items; 'BHCA' = 91. BHCAP859 = BHCA + P859 (CET1 capital), BHCAP793 = BHCA + P793 (CET1 ratio). Use BHCA. Advanced-approaches series is BHCW, not BHCAP.
Most comprehensive bank-level view. Verified consolidated via Fed MDRM item 2170 (RCFD2170).
Excludes foreign branches/agencies. Verified via Fed MDRM item 2170 (RCON2170 = domestic-only).

description: Bank Schedule RC-R risk-based capital items (031 filers)
notes: RC-R capital series for FFIEC 031 filers. RCFA2170 appears from 2020 (Fed MDRM item 2170).
Year-to-date income items (reset each calendar year).
4-char MDRM mnemonic; full code = UBPR + 4-char item (e.g. UBPRE001). Computed/derived from Call Report data.
NOT a separate 4-char MDRM mnemonic — this is the UBPR mnemonic plus item codes beginning 'E' (e.g. UBPRE001). Kept for convenience.
NOT a separate 4-char MDRM mnemonic — UBPR mnemonic plus item codes beginning 'M'. Kept for convenience.
